ogTitle: Pemulwuy vs Pendle Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pemulwuy and Pendle Hill.
heading: Pemulwuy vs Pendle Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pemulwuy, New South Wales and Pendle Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pemulwuy has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Pendle Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pemulwuy or Pendle Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pemulwuy has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Pendle Hill scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pemulwuy scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Pendle Hill scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pemulwuy or Pendle Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pemulwuy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
